title: rostellularia neesii
intro: Rostellularia neesii, also known as the Blue Devil, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rostellularia neesii include reducing fever, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
